title: wissadula periplocifolia var. luciana
intro: Wissadula periplocifolia var. luciana, also known as Luciana wissadula, is a plant species of the Malvaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. Luciana wissadula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat a range of health issues.
